---
title: "LMEContrast"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel mixed-model t-contrast result."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LMEContrast -->
```python
class LMEContrast(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LMEContrast -->
Per-voxel mixed-model t-contrast result.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
